response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility, and demonstrable leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and open-source tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI cloud role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong cloud and DevOps background with AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects and mentoring
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or production AI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture
Limited documentation of LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph), or AI evaluation pipelines
